title: The Crash
tmdbOverview: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.
synopsis: Released in 2026, The Crash is a documentary and crime film from United Kingdom. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
